changes.description: Added Quick View overlay bar button to product tiles with conditional modal mounting to prevent SSR API calls
Added unit tests for overlay bar aria-label fallbacks, positioning, and base tile wrapper structure
Added QuickViewErrorBoundary class component to isolate ProductView render failures inside the modal
Added tests for imageSize prop forwarding and ErrorBoundary fallback when ProductView throws
Comprehensive Playwright E2E test suite for Quick View button visibility, accessibility, modal interactions, and navigation
